name: Spicy Red Beans and Rice Salad
recipeIngredient: 2 cans (15 oz) red beans or light red kidney beans
1 1/2 cups cooked long grain white rice
recipeInstructions:
1. Using a strainer, drain beans and rinse very well under cold running water.
2. Transfer to serving dish and toss gently with rice, onions, and tomato. Set aside.
3. Combine CREOLE SPICE ingredients. Stir or shake well to combine. Sprinkle 1 teaspoon over beans and rice.
4. Combine dressing ingredients. Let stand 5 minutes, then toss gently with bean mixture. Serve immediately.
Makes 8 servings, about 1/2 cup each.
(visit bean growers on the web)
